title: PM MODI'S APPEAL | SUVENDU ADHIKARI'S MAJOR DECISIONS | MAMATA BANERJEE ALLEGATIONS - MAY 11, 2026
description: Today’s top India news in 3 minutes: Chandranath Rath murder case arrests, PM Modi’s fuel-saving appeal, Bengal CM Suvendu Adhikari’s first cabinet decisions, TMC’s Supreme Court claim on SIR voter deletions, VB-G RAM G Act replacing MGNREGA, Modi’s UAE visit, India’s renewable energy rise, and Telangana’s tragic Hayabusa accident.
